title: Antibiotics for algaculture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bsfl","text":"Antibiotics recipe adapted from Roscoff Culture Collection protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: To 10 mL of MilliQ water Contributed by users , add any 3 of: 0.5 g, Ampicillin 0.1 g, Gentamicin 0.2 g, Kanamycin 1 g, Neomycin 0.2 g, Streptomycin It is best not to use all ABX in every solution, but to use a selection of 2-3 so that you can change the combinations in future solutions in case of bacterial resistance developing.
Mix the solution well and filter using a 0.2 μM filter into a sterile bottle. Store in the fridge at 4 °C up to 1 month .
creator: Victoria LN Jackson
